default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: I'm Hitomi. I look forward to working with you!

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Not by a long shot! The real show is just starting!

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: I've never felt more ready! Nothing can stop us this time!

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Let's stay sharp, okay?

default.title: Victory
default.text: Quite the team, aren't we?

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: It's not over... Next time, I will get it right.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Try and keep up if you can!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: Everyone... I'm so sorry...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Feeling great! Nothing will slip by me now.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: Someone's cheerful. Everything's going your way today?

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Quite the team, aren't we?

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: You can count on me. I won't let you down!

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Feeling like we're in sync?

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: There’s never a dull moment when I'm with you.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: Let's stay sharp, okay?

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: Have I earned a bit more of your trust now?

default.title: Idle
default.text: It's boring just waiting around, you know.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Seriously... you're so clingy!

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: That means a lot. I promise, I won't let you down.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: You can count on me. I won't let you down!

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: I'm back! So, did I live up to your expectations?

default.title: Level Up
default.text: Feeling great! Nothing will slip by me now.

neon_raindrops.title: Attire Obtained
neon_raindrops.text: Well? Does it suit me? Don't just stand there staring...

neon_raindrops.title: Level Up
neon_raindrops.text: You can place your trust in my strength.

neon_raindrops.title: Greeting
neon_raindrops.text: There you are. I've been waiting. So, what's our plan for today?

neon_raindrops.title: Ordinary Contact 1
neon_raindrops.text: Wow... Look at that... It takes me back. Dad used to show me beautiful views just like this.

neon_raindrops.title: Ordinary Contact 2
neon_raindrops.text: Hey, listen! You won't believe what happened!

neon_raindrops.title: Idle
neon_raindrops.text: Hmph. And here I am, being ignored because someone is too busy.

neon_raindrops.title: Annoyed
neon_raindrops.text: Sigh... You're teasing me again, aren't you?
